pages.text: $(bold)Oak Seed$()$(br2)The dynamic oak — first tree most worlds meet. Falls from its leaves and thin branches.
pages.title: Oak Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Dirt$() → $(italic)Oak Sapling$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
